name: AC2 Reference
description: Reference OpenClaw plugin for the AC2 protocol. The `ac2` channel owns pairing over Liquid Auth + WebRTC; `ac2_sign` and `ac2_capabilities` route through the active channel session.

channelEnvVars.name: AC2_LIQUID_AUTH_SERVER
channelEnvVars.description: Liquid Auth signaling server origin. Overrides the `liquidAuthServer` channel config at runtime. Defaults to https://debug.liquidauth.com when neither is set.

liquidAuthServer.description: Liquid Auth signaling server origin. Overridable via the `AC2_LIQUID_AUTH_SERVER` env var. Production deployments MUST set this; the bundled stub is for tests/demos only.

defaultTimeoutMs.description: Default ceiling for awaiting pairing and SigningResponse, in milliseconds.

ac2_sign.label: AC2 Sign
ac2_sign.description: Ask the user's connected wallet (over the active `ac2` channel) to sign the supplied base64 payload. Returns `{ status: "signed", signature, publicKey, ... }` on approval or `{ status: "rejected", reason }` on decline. Requires an active `ac2` channel; otherwise rejects with `no_active_session`.

description.description: Human-readable purpose shown to the user in the wallet. REQUIRED by the AC2 spec — vague descriptions get declined.

payload_base64.description: Base64-encoded raw bytes the wallet will sign. The core reference signs these bytes as-is under the selected curve; downstream plugins may apply additional encodings based on `sig_hint`.

sig_hint.description: AC2 sig_hint identifying the curve to use: 'raw-ed25519' or 'raw-secp256k1'. Downstream wallet plugins may accept additional, chain-specific hints.

display_hint.description: How the wallet should preview the payload: 'text' | 'json' | 'hex'.

expires_in_seconds.description: Optional TTL for the request. The wallet MUST reject responses received after this time.

ac2_capabilities.label: AC2 Capabilities
ac2_capabilities.description: Return the agent's AC2 descriptor and the protocol catalog of sig_hints. Reports whether an `ac2` channel session is currently active. Downstream wallet-specific plugins extend this with live wallet identities/accounts.

refresh.description: No-op accepted for API parity with downstream plugins. The core reference does not cache.

ac2.label: AC2
ac2.description: Pair an AC2 Controller / wallet over Liquid Auth + WebRTC. Once paired, `ac2_sign` and `ac2_capabilities` route through the active DataChannel.

liquidAuthServer.description: Liquid Auth server URL. Falls back to the AC2_LIQUID_AUTH_SERVER env var, then to the bundled stub.
